title: Challenge Craft
description: ⚔️ Play the challenges from your favorite YouTubers! ⚔️ 38 challenge modes, randomizers, and chaos mechanics combined with lifetime XP progression. Every world is a new challenge run.
body:
# **Challenge Craft** ![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.5-5fbf4a?style=for-the-badge) ![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-3f9bff?style=for-the-badge) ![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21-f89820?style=for-the-badge) ![Challenges](https://img.shields.io/badge/Challenges-38-9b59ff?style=for-the-badge) ⚔️ **Turn every Minecraft world into a challenge run.** Challenge Craft is a progression-based **Fabric** mod that transforms normal survival into replayable challenge worlds. Build challenge combinations, survive brutal modifiers, and earn **Lifetime XP** as you unlock more and more of the mod over time. Suggest me new challenges and I will add them! ✨ ═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## 🌍 What is Challenge Craft? **Challenge Craft** is a Minecraft mod built around **challenge-based world creation** and **persistent progression**. Instead of only making Minecraft harder, it changes the _way_ you play: * 🎲 Randomizer-style worlds * 💀 Brutal survival modifiers * 🧠 Objective and trivia-based runs * 🧱 World-changing chaos * 📈 Persistent progression through **Lifetime XP** * 👥 Multiplayer suffering with friends Every run can feel completely different depending on which challenges you enable. ═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## ✨ Main Features * ⚔️ **38 unique challenges** * 🎮 Play with **single** or **stacked** challenge combinations * 📈 **Lifetime XP progression** across worlds * 🔓 New challenges unlock as you level up * 🪄 Permanent perk unlocks * 🏆 Challenge completion feedback and reward popups * 👥 Great for singleplayer, co-op, events, and challenge servers ═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## 📈 XP Progression Challenge Craft is not just about beating one world once. The mod features a **Lifetime XP progression system** that carries across your runs and steadily unlocks more content: * 🧩 more challenges * 🪄 more perks * 🔥 harder and more creative world combinations * 📦 major milestone rewards like the **Infinite Chest** Reaching the later levels is a goal by itself, and even after max level there is still **more progression waiting to be discovered**. ✨ ═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## 🧩 Challenges

Challenges are listed below in the order they unlock.

Level 1

Level = Item
Use the Challenge Stick to convert all of your current XP levels into that many copies of a random item.

Random Item every 30s
Every 30 seconds, each player receives a random item.

Random Chunk Blocks
Each chunk is transformed into one random solid block type.

500 Blocks = Item
Walk 500 blocks to earn a random item.

Damage = Item
Taking damage rewards you with random items.

Level 2

No Chest Loot
Loot chests generate empty.

No Regeneration
Natural health regeneration is disabled.

Level 3

No Villager Trading
Villagers can no longer be traded with.

Max Health Modifier
Start the world with a custom maximum health setting.

Game Speed
Increase the speed of the entire game with a slider.

Level 4

No Crafting Table
Crafting tables cannot be used.

Random Enchantment every 30s
The item in your main hand gets a random enchantment every 30 seconds.

Level 5

Skyblock World
Generate your world as a Skyblock-style survival start.

Limit Inventory Slots
Reduce how many inventory slots you can use and lock the rest.

No Armor
Armor slots are blocked.

Level 6

Randomized Crafting
Crafting recipes are shuffled, forcing you to relearn progression.

All Achievements
Complete the vanilla advancement hunt in tracked challenge form.

Level 7

Hardcore Challenge
If you die, the run is effectively failed and no longer counts the same way for progression.

Chunk Hunt
Entering a new chunk locks the border to that chunk, transforms the chunk, and spawns a glowing target mob you must defeat to escape.

Level 8

Mob Health Multiplier
Increase mob health with a configurable multiplier.

Walk = Damage
Every block walked hurts you.

Heavy Pockets
The fuller your inventory gets, the slower you become.

Level 9

Damage = Border
Taking damage expands the world border.

Corrosive Tools
Durability loss can downgrade tools and weapons over time.

Level 10

Level = Border
The world border scales with player XP level.

Symbiotic Bond
In multiplayer, damage to one player is damage to everyone.

Level 11

The Floor is Lava
Ground becomes dangerous and standing still too long will burn you.

Level 12

No Block Drops
Blocks no longer drop their normal items when broken.

Size Matters
Mobs spawn at random sizes. Smaller mobs are faster, while larger mobs are stronger and tankier.

Level 13

No Mob Drops
Mobs stop dropping loot when killed.

Level 14

Upside Down Drops
Dropped items float upward instead of falling down.

Level 15

All Entities
Kill every eligible vanilla entity in a random order.

Level 16

Random Block Drops
Every block type drops a different random item, fixed by the world seed.

Level 17

Random Mob Drops
Mob loot tables are shuffled so mobs drop loot from other mobs.

Minecraft Trivia
Every 2 minutes you must answer a trivia question correctly or die.

Level 18

Double Trouble
Newly spawned mobs are multiplied by a configurable amount.

Level 19

Mine = Potion Effect
Mining blocks gives you a random potion effect based on the block you mined.

Level 20

All Items
Collect every survival-obtainable vanilla item in a random order.

═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## 🪄 Perks

Perks unlock as your Lifetime XP increases and give you more options for future runs.

Level 3

Night Vision

Level 5

Swift Footing

Level 10

Tough Skin

Level 11

Fire Resistance

Level 14

Strength

Level 15

Scholar

Level 18

Resistance

Level 20

Infinite Chest 📦

✨ And yes — progression does not completely end there.

═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## 👥 Multiplayer Challenge Craft becomes even more fun in multiplayer. **Great picks for co-op worlds:** * 💥 **Symbiotic Bond** * 👾 **Double Trouble** * 🎯 **Chunk Hunt** * 📚 **Minecraft Trivia** * 🏆 **All Items** * ☠️ **All Entities** * ✅ **All Achievements** **Perfect for:** * co-op survival * hardcore group runs * event servers * challenge races * streamer/community worlds ═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## 🤝 **BisectHosting Partnership** Play **Challenge Craft** solo or suffer together with friends on your own server. [**Create your server with BisectHosting here**](https://www.bisecthosting.com/p/kasax007) Use promo code `KASAX007` at checkout to get **25% off your first gaming server**. [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Dreamcraft/bh_promo.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/kasax007)

🛠️ Fabric Server Setup

Server Requirements

  • Minecraft Version: 1.21.5
  • Mod Loader: Fabric
  • Java: 21
  • Required Dependency: Fabric API

How to install

  1. Create a new server with BisectHosting.
  2. Select Minecraft 1.21.5.
  3. Choose Fabric as your server type.
  4. Start the server once so all files are generated.
  5. Stop the server again.
  6. Upload Challenge Craft into the server's mods folder.
  7. Upload Fabric API into the same mods folder.
  8. Start the server.
  9. Install the same mods on your client as well:
    • Challenge Craft
    • Fabric API

⚠️ For multiplayer, the mod should be installed on both client and server.

═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## 📸 Screenshots _Screenshots coming soon._ I will add challenge menus, world examples, HUDs, progression screens, and gameplay moments here later. ═══════════════ ✦ ═══════════════ ## ❤️ Why play Challenge Craft? If normal survival feels too predictable, **Challenge Craft** gives you a reason to start over again and again. Every run can become: * 🎲 a randomizer * 💀 a hardcore gauntlet * 🧱 a cursed world-gen experiment * 👥 a multiplayer disaster * 📈 a progression grind * 🏆 a completionist challenge **Challenge Craft** is built for players who want variety, pressure, progression, and replayability in every Minecraft world. business inquiry: [kasax007.twitch@gmail.com](mailto:kasax007.twitch@gmail.com) Join the Discord here: [click me](https://discord.com/invite/zuZVtVvJaY) ## Trailer [![Challenge Craft TikTok Trailer](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/thumbnails/1748/579/64/64/639112740488909681.png)](https://www.tiktok.com/@kasax007/video/7627187748335537430) Click the image to watch the TikTok showcase.
